message:
feat: expand SDK runtime, policy engine, and connector robustness

Multi-crate improvements across the flywheel connectors ecosystem:

SDK (fcp-sdk):
- Expand prelude re-exports to include all commonly needed types
  (EventPayload, Connector, ConnectorConfig, etc.) for better ergonomics
- Add runtime module with environment detection, version info, feature
  probing, and structured runtime metadata for diagnostics
- Update lib.rs module declarations

Core (fcp-core):
- Update event type field documentation and model descriptions
- Regenerate CBOR test vectors for enrollment and simulation requests

CLI (fcp-cli):
- Enhance policy engine with additional validation rules and improved
  structured logging for policy evaluation decisions
- Update policy E2E test expectations

Connectors:
- Add missing import in telegram connector for robustness

Test vectors:
- Update core serialization vectors to match schema changes
- Sync beads issue tracker with latest status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
